result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon product detail page for a ring light; search bar shows “16-inch ring light,” but the visible product is a 14" Aureday selfie ring light with tripod and phone holder.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“16-inch ring light” (search bar), “Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder, Dimmable LED…”, “Phone Holder”, “Dimmable LED”, “$31.99”, “4.4”, “(14,056)”, “5K+ bought in past month”
selected_candidate:
Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder
constraint_evidence:
- 16-inch ring light: contradicted (visible product is 14", not 16")
- adjustable brightness: supported (visible “Dimmable LED”)
- phone holder: supported (visible in title)
- under $40: supported ($31.99 visible)
- Amazon product on Amazon: supported (Amazon product page / URL)
action_target:
Send [EXIT] to user as requested by trajectory context.
success_signals:
Visible product matches several constraints: ring light, phone holder, adjustable brightness, under $40.
failure_signals:
Does not satisfy the 16-inch size constraint; current product is 14".
uncertainty:
No uncertainty about price/phone holder/brightness from visible text; size mismatch is clear.

task_context.task: navigate: Find a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.
task_context.title: Amazon.com. Spend less. Smile more.

args.task: navigate: Find a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.

args.query: Amazon shopping task selected 14-inch ring light instead of requested 16-inch ring light; size constraint violated while brightness, phone holder, and price under $40 were satisfied

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

evidence.claim: High-detail inspection of the final state shows the visible product is 'Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder' while the task asked for a 16-inch ring light.
The same final-state inspection supports the other constraints: 'Dimmable LED' indicates adjustable brightness, 'Phone Holder' is visible, and '$31.99' is under $40.
The trajectory ended immediately after reaching the product detail page and sending '[EXIT]', so the only concrete issue is failure to verify the hard 16-inch size constraint before stopping.
A retrieval of a similar failure pattern returned fm_missed_constraint_001, which matches this kind of missed hard-constraint verification.

args.expected_behavior: Verify that the selected Amazon ring light satisfies all hard constraints, including the 16-inch size, before stopping or returning success.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on an Amazon product detail page for a 14-inch Aureday ring light that otherwise matched brightness, phone-holder, and price constraints, without confirming the required 16-inch size.
args.regression_rule: When a task includes an explicit hard attribute like size, the agent must confirm that attribute in the final selected item before ending the run; do not treat partial satisfaction as success.

suggested_followups.label: Need exact size verified
suggested_followups.message: Ask for a trace where the agent explicitly checks the product size before stopping.

suggested_followups.label: Other constraint misses
suggested_followups.message: Find runs where the product matched price/features but missed one required attribute.
